---
title: "R Python Quarto Template"
author: BenKorea
description: "R Python Quarto-website 프로젝트 겸용 Template"
date: "2025-08-01"
date-modified: last-modified
---


```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
#| message: false

# 프로젝트에 필요한 패키지들 일괄 호출
library(here)
library(logger)

# ./src/common/logger.R 호출
invisible(lapply(
  list.files(here::here("src", "common"), pattern = "\\.R$", full.names = TRUE),
  source,
  encoding = "UTF-8"
))

```
